description: Dynamo Frontend + SGLang Engine — pipeline view with per-pool KV breakdown (full / SWA / Mamba), routing overhead, and collapsed disagg/hicache/per-worker rows. Sources: Dynamo metrics from the frontend HTTP port, SGLang engine metrics from the worker DYN_SYSTEM_PORT.

panels.title: Request Success Rate
panels.description: DYN: dynamo_frontend_requests_total filtered to status=success / total

panels.title: Total Requests
panels.description: DYN: dynamo_frontend_requests_total (cumulative)

panels.title: Input Tokens
panels.description: DYN: dynamo_frontend_input_sequence_tokens_sum (cumulative)

panels.title: Output Tokens
panels.description: DYN: dynamo_frontend_output_tokens_total (cumulative)

panels.title: Avg TTFT (frontend)
panels.description: DYN: dynamo_frontend_time_to_first_token_seconds (rate sum / rate count)

panels.title: Avg ITL (frontend)
panels.description: DYN: dynamo_frontend_inter_token_latency_seconds (rate sum / rate count)

panels.title: Avg E2E Latency
panels.description: DYN: dynamo_frontend_request_duration_seconds (rate sum / rate count)

panels.title: GPU KV Util %
panels.description: SGL: sglang:token_usage (overall KV pool fraction in [0,1])

panels.title: Frontend RPS
panels.description: DYN: rate(dynamo_frontend_requests_total)

panels.title: E2E Request Latency
panels.description: DYN: dynamo_frontend_request_duration_seconds histogram

panels.title: Request Outcome Breakdown
panels.description: DYN: dynamo_frontend_requests_total grouped by status code

panels.title: Inflight vs Queued Requests
panels.description: DYN: dynamo_frontend_inflight_requests / queued_requests gauges. Inflight = currently being processed (dispatched to a worker, awaiting completion). Queued = received by the frontend but not yet dispatched (waiting on router scheduling / worker permit). Inflight pinned at the worker concurrency limit while queued grows means workers are saturated and the gateway is buffering.

panels.title: Frontend TTFT (p50/p90/p99)
panels.description: DYN: dynamo_frontend_time_to_first_token_seconds histogram

panels.title: Frontend ITL (p50/p90/p99)
panels.description: DYN: dynamo_frontend_inter_token_latency_seconds histogram

panels.title: Input Sequence Length (p50/p90/p99)
panels.description: DYN: dynamo_frontend_input_sequence_tokens histogram (tokens)

panels.title: Output Sequence Length (p50/p90/p99)
panels.description: DYN: dynamo_frontend_output_sequence_tokens histogram (tokens)

panels.title: Cached Tokens (p50/p90/p99)
panels.description: DYN: dynamo_frontend_cached_tokens histogram (tokens reused from cache)

panels.title: Router KV Hit Rate Distribution
panels.description: DYN: dynamo_component_router_kv_hit_rate histogram (router-side prefix-cache hit rate per request)

panels.title: Router Overhead Breakdown (avg + p90)
panels.description: DYN: per-stage routing overhead histograms (block_hashing / indexer_find_matches / seq_hashing / scheduling / total)

panels.title: Per-Worker Inflight Requests (generate)
panels.description: DYN (worker side): dynamo_component_inflight_requests filtered to generate endpoint, grouped by worker_id

panels.title: Total KV Blocks (per worker dp_rank)
panels.description: DYN (worker side): dynamo_component_total_blocks — total KV blocks reported per dp_rank

panels.title: Per-Worker Detail — fan out by worker_id
Successful Request Rate Per Worker
panels.description: DYN (worker side): dynamo_component_requests_total{dynamo_endpoint=generate} grouped by worker_id

panels.title: KV Cache Hit Rate Per Worker
panels.description: SGL: sglang:cache_hit_rate grouped by worker_id

panels.title: KV Pool Utilization Per Worker
panels.description: SGL: sglang:token_usage grouped by worker_id

panels.title: E2E Request Latency Per Worker (p99)
panels.description: SGL: sglang:e2e_request_latency_seconds_bucket grouped by worker_id

panels.title: Running / Queued / Paused Requests
panels.description: SGL: sglang:num_running_reqs / num_queue_reqs / num_paused_reqs gauges

panels.title: Token Generation Throughput
panels.description: SGL: sglang:gen_throughput (tokens/sec across schedulers)

panels.title: Engine TTFT (p50/p90/p99)
panels.description: SGL: sglang:time_to_first_token_seconds histogram (engine-internal TTFT, excludes frontend overhead)

panels.title: Engine ITL (p50/p90/p99)
panels.description: SGL: sglang:inter_token_latency_seconds histogram

panels.title: Retracted Requests + New Token Ratio
panels.description: SGL: sglang:num_retracted_reqs (preempted) and sglang:new_token_ratio

panels.title: Speculative Decoding — Accept Rate
panels.description: SGL: sglang:spec_accept_rate (fraction of speculatively-drafted tokens accepted by the verifier). Zero on runs without --speculative-algorithm. Higher = better draft quality, more tokens-per-step.

panels.title: Speculative Decoding — Accept Length
panels.description: SGL: sglang:spec_accept_length (avg accepted tokens per draft step). Zero on runs without --speculative-algorithm. Effectively the speedup multiplier vs non-spec decode.

panels.title: SGLang Engine — KV Pool Breakdown (per pool type)
Pool Utilization % — Full / SWA / Mamba
panels.description: SGL: per-pool fractional usage. full_token_usage = full-attention KV pool, swa_token_usage = sliding-window pool (populates on hybrid SWA models like Gemma-2), mamba_usage = Mamba SSM state pool (populates on hybrid SSM models like Jamba). Non-hybrid models only move `full attention`.

panels.title: Absolute KV Pool Tokens (used / evictable / available)
panels.description: SGL: token counts in the main KV pool. used+evictable+available <= max_total_num_tokens. On hybrid models these reflect the FULL-attention pool only.

panels.title: Cache Hit Rate (engine-side)
panels.description: SGL: sglang:cache_hit_rate (radix prefix-cache hits)

panels.title: Pending Pre-alloc Tokens (PD)
panels.description: SGL: sglang:pending_prealloc_token_usage (disagg pre-allocation reservation; 0 in agg mode)

panels.title: Streaming Sessions Held Tokens
panels.description: SGL: sglang:streaming_session_held_tokens (KV held by retained streaming sessions)

panels.title: LoRA Pool Utilization
panels.description: SGL: sglang:lora_pool_* (only emitted when --enable-lora). Empty in non-LoRA runs.

panels.title: Pool Capacity Reference
panels.description: SGL: static pool sizing — max_total_num_tokens / num_pages / page_size

panels.title: Prefill Queues
panels.description: SGL: prefill-side disagg queues (zero in agg mode)

panels.title: Decode Queues
panels.description: SGL: decode-side disagg queues (zero in agg mode)

panels.title: HiCache Host Tokens (used vs total)
panels.description: SGL: sglang:hicache_host_used_tokens / hicache_host_total_tokens (RAM tier; zero unless --enable-hierarchical-cache)

panels.title: Host Tier Utilization %
panels.description: Derived: hicache_host_used / hicache_host_total

panels.title: Eviction & Load-back Rate by Cache Type
panels.description: SGL: sglang:evicted_tokens_total / load_back_tokens_total (labeled by cache_type — RadixCache, SWARadixCache, MambaRadixCache, etc.)

panels.title: Eviction Latency (p99) by Cache Type
panels.description: SGL: sglang:eviction_duration_seconds_bucket grouped by cache_type

panels.title: Prefetch / Backup Tokens Rate
panels.description: SGL: sglang:prefetched_tokens_total / backuped_tokens_total (hicache prefetch + backup activity)

panels.title: Load-back Latency (p99) by Cache Type
panels.description: SGL: sglang:load_back_duration_seconds_bucket grouped by cache_type

panels.title: GPU Utilization (DCGM)
panels.description: DCGM: DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL (only when dcgm-exporter is running)

panels.title: GPU KV Cache Usage % (Dynamo-reported)
panels.description: DYN (worker side): dynamo_component_gpu_cache_usage_percent — Dynamo runtime's view of KV utilization

panels.title: Tokio Worker Busy Ratio
panels.description: DYN: dynamo_tokio_worker_busy_ratio — async runtime saturation; >0.9 sustained means runtime is starved

panels.title: Request-Plane RTT TTFT
panels.description: DYN: dynamo_request_plane_roundtrip_ttft_seconds (frontend↔worker request-plane TTFT, excludes engine compute)

title: Dynamo + SGLang Engine
